output.change: Logo container changed from 'block self-stretch' to 'flex items-center self-stretch' in TSX (2 occurrences) and PHP (1 occurrence)

code1_logoFlexClasses.description: All 3 logo containers use 'flex items-center self-stretch' (not 'block') in HeaderMain.tsx and HeaderMain.php
code1_logoFlexClasses.detail: TSX line 533 (ImageDropUploader): 'flex items-center self-stretch text-white w-auto *:w-auto *:max-w-full *:h-full *:object-contain shrink-0 max-md:*:max-h-[26px] md:*:max-h-[58px] focus-visible:outline-dotted focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2'. TSX line 544 (anchor): identical string. PHP line 76 (anchor): identical string. No occurrence of 'block self-stretch' remains in any file.

code2_tsxPhpSync.description: TSX <a> and PHP <a> logo class strings match exactly
code2_tsxPhpSync.detail: TSX line 544 className and PHP line 76 class are character-for-character identical: 'flex items-center self-stretch text-white w-auto *:w-auto *:max-w-full *:h-full *:object-contain shrink-0 max-md:*:max-h-[26px] md:*:max-h-[58px] focus-visible:outline-dotted focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2'. TSX also has the ImageDropUploader path (line 533, editor-only) which uses the same string. No sync gap.

frontend1_logoCentering.description: Logo is vertically centered within the nav bar
frontend1_logoCentering.detail: At 1440px the logo (insect icon + IGNITE wordmark) sits vertically centered within the nav bar pill across all header variations. In single-row variations (Minimal Content, Hide on Scroll Down, Not Fixed on Scroll, Submenu Alignment Right, etc.) the logo is centered against the full pill height. In two-row variations (Full Content) the logo is centered against the taller pill that contains both the utility row and nav row. The flex + items-center combination achieves correct vertical alignment without needing explicit height or line-height overrides.

frontend2_mobileNoRegression.description: No layout regressions on mobile — logo still respects max-h constraints
frontend2_mobileNoRegression.detail: At 375px the logo renders at the correct mobile size (max-md:*:max-h-[26px]) with no overflow, distortion, or layout breakage. The flex + items-center change does not interfere with the *:max-h constraints as those are applied to child elements, not the container itself. All 10 variations render correctly at mobile width.

supplementary.purpose: Close-up viewport shot confirming logo vertical centering in the nav bar at desktop width

visualObservations.375px: Mobile layout. Logo at max-h-[26px] inside all variations — small but correctly sized and vertically centered within the pill. No max-h overflow. All 10 variations render correctly.
visualObservations.768px: Tablet, mobile layout. Logo at mobile height, centered. Consistent across all variations.
visualObservations.1024px: Desktop layout. Logo at max-h-[58px], vertically centered in the pill. Two-row and single-row variations both show correct centering.
visualObservations.1440px: Full desktop. Logo centered vertically in all 10 variations. Most clearly visible in single-row variations (Minimal Content, Not Fixed, etc.) where the full pill height is shorter — logo sits cleanly mid-height. Two-row Full Content variations show logo centered against the taller pill.
